_comment: Brand profile: the structured brand extracted from a brand-guidelines doc, fed to `npm run import-brand` or the MCP `apply_brand` tool. Only `colors.primary` is essential; everything else is optional and falls back to ADS defaults (the import reports what it derived/kept). The ADS theme only controls brand surface — colors, fonts, radius; spacing/type-scale/shadows/motion are system design decisions.
name: Acme Light
